title: Verb Status Event
description: Real-time verb lifecycle events sent over WebSocket when notifyEvents is enabled on the session. These are informational — no response is expected.

verb.description: The verb name (e.g. 'say', 'play', 'gather'). Present on synthesized-audio, start-playback, stop-playback, kill-playback, and dtmf/speech-bargein events.

name.description: The verb name. Present on 'starting' and 'finished' events (these use 'name' instead of 'verb').

id.description: The verb instance id, if one was assigned by the application.

vendor.description: TTS vendor name. Present on synthesized-audio events.

language.description: TTS language code. Present on synthesized-audio events.

characters.description: Number of characters synthesized. Present on synthesized-audio events when not served from cache.

elapsed_time.description: TTS round-trip time in milliseconds. Present on synthesized-audio events when not served from cache.

served_from_cache.description: Whether the TTS audio was served from cache. Present on synthesized-audio events.
